name: Gudanar da Raunin sanyi
description: Gudanar da sanyi, ƙafar nutsewa (ƙafar maƙarƙashiya), da kuma hypothermia. Ana iya rigakafin raunin sanyi -- gane alamun farko kafin lalacewar nama ba ta iya dawowa. Sarrafa nama mai sanyi a hankali sosai.
equipment: Ruwan dumi (38-42C/100-108F) don sake dumama wanka
steps: HYPOTHERMIA NA FARKO: Tantance ainihin zafin jiki tare da ƙananan ma'aunin zafi da sanyio. M (32-35C): rawar jiki, rudani. Matsakaici (28-32C): babu rawar jiki, rudani mai tsanani. Mai tsanani (<28C): sume, babu bugun jini da za'a iya ganowa.

HYPOTHERMIA -- M / Matsakaici: Cire rigar tufafi, rufewa daga ƙasa, yanayi mai dumi, dumi mai dadi idan an sani, fakitin zafi zuwa axillae / makwancin gwaiwa (ba kai tsaye a kan fata ba). Karɓa a hankali - jarring na iya jawo VFib.

HYPOTHERMIA -- Tsanani: Karɓa sosai a hankali. Duba bugun bugun jini 60 cikakkun dakika kafin CPR. Fara CPR idan babu bugun jini. Ruwan ruwa mai dumi idan akwai. MEDEVAC fifiko -- 'ba a mutu ba har sai dumi da matattu'.

FROSTBITE: Sama (fata fari/ launin toka, taushi a ƙasa) vs. zurfi (wuya, jin katako, blistering). KAR KA shafa yankin. KAR a sake dumi idan haɗarin sake daskarewa -- sake daskarewa yana haifar da muni fiye da jinkirin sakewar.
FROSTBITE rewarming: nutse a cikin 38-42C ruwa (ba zafi) na 15-30 min har sai nama ya yi laushi da ja / m. Yana da zafi sosai - bayar da analgesia (ketamine ko morphine).
Bayan sake dumama: kushin tsakanin yatsun kafa/yatsu tare da gauze mara kyau. KAR KA BUGA blisters. Kare daga matsin lamba.
KAFARKIN IMMERSION (Ƙafar Maɓalli): Tsawon jika/sanyi bayyanar, fata ja sannan ta yi fari sannan ta yi tari. Busassun ƙafafu, dumi a hankali, ɗagawa. KAR a shafa zafi kai tsaye.
Takaddun lokacin rauni da lokacin sakewa.
warnings: Kar a sake dumama sanyi idan akwai wata dama ta sake daskarewa -- rewarming rashin cikawa + sake daskarewa = asarar nama mai bala'i.
Tsananin hypothermia na iya kwatanta mutuwa. Duba bugun jini na daƙiƙa 60. 'Ba a mutu ba sai dumi da matattu.'
Barasa yana ƙara asarar zafi duk da fahimtar zafi -- kar a ba da barasa.
Haɗarin VFib yana da girma a cikin matsananciyar hypothermia -- rage magudi da lalata majiyyaci.

pediatric.note: Yara suna yin sanyi da sauri saboda mafi girman yanki zuwa rabo mai yawa. Hypothermia yana da tsayi iri ɗaya. Dumi-dumin ruwa na IV mai mahimmanci. Ruwa na tushen nauyi: 20 ml/kg dumi LR.

obstetric.note: Ciwon ciki na mahaifa yana haifar da bradycardia na tayin da acidosis. Maimaita mata mai tsanani shine maganin tayi. Sa idanu tayi idan akwai.

source: JTS CPG: Cold Weather Injuries / PHTLS / Wilderness Medicine
